description: Style NoteThe cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little boy in these denim shorts from gini and jony. Team them with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.Product DetailsBlue raw washed denim shorts with two side pockets, two back pockets, zipped front closure, has adjustable elasticated waist with belt loopsMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron on print/embroidery
